programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Baited by Love
programme.desc: In a whirlwind romance, a beautiful college student falls under the spell of a local bad boy. He enourages her to help him with his criminal activities, and out of love she agrees. But when the two find themselves in an intense moment of danger, she quickly throws her morals away to protect her man.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Young and Na�ve
programme.desc: When a teenage girl meets a handsome, charming older man, she feels like everything in her life is falling into place. But soon, a gruesome discovery related to the disappearance of a local woman will reveal a darker side to this love story. Before long, police are on the trail of a teen who would go to any lengths to be with her man.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Horror Beneath the Ashes
programme.desc: A community is rocked when a mom, her children, and their neighbor are brutally murdered. As detectives try to uncover who would commit such a heinous quadruple homicide, their investigation leads to an undeniable clue pointing to the killer.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Struck by Jealousy
programme.desc: A loving nurse and mother is found bludgeoned to death in her home with evidence suggesting the killer is someone she knew. So when police learn of her involvement with multiple men, an act of jealousy seems likely � but which boyfriend is to blame?

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Wali Muhammad
programme.desc: Quinn and Vince are called to investigate the death of man found in a trap house in a suburban neighborhood. While uncovering nicknames and chasing down leads, Vince will find himself in a dangerous standoff to bring in the killer.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Kenyon Beaty
programme.desc: A casual summer morning turns deadly as a man is killed in a drive-by shooting. To solve this case, Quinn and Vince must build trust with the community and key witnesses to discover the leads they need to find the killer's true motive and identity.

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - Revenge Gone Wrong
programme.desc: When a man is shot and killed soon after an alleged domestic assault, authorities suspect the girlfriend, but through their investigation they learn she did indeed seek payback, but it was not intended to be deadly.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Clarksdale, Mississippi
programme.desc: In 2013, mayoral candidate Marco McMillian was hoping to bring seismic change to his hometown of Clarksdale, Mississippi. But before he has his chance, he's found dead under mysterious circumstances, sparking rumors of a political assassination.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - A Wicked Rival
programme.desc: When 34-year-old Julii Johnson is gunned down in front of her boyfriend’s home, police are baffled by the lack of a motive – until they find half a million dollars hidden in her boyfriend’s condo. Was the murder payback by a rival drug dealer? Or did this “It Girl” finally make the wrong woman jealous?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - The Lone Wolf
programme.desc: It seemed nothing could tear these three best friends apart. But behind closed doors trouble was brewing, and things would boil over in the most horrifying way. Now it’s up to detectives to determine what triggered the bloodshed? And who’s to blame?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - The Blade of a Broken Heart
programme.desc: A young father who was excited to watch his sons grow up is fatally stabbed on Thanksgiving weekend. When detectives uncover a love triangle, they question the motive behind his murder and find a killer determined to have their pie... and eat it too.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Ciera Johnson/Krystal Riordan
programme.desc: Ciera Johnson has been living a righteous life in Cleveland. But when her boyfriend questions her loyalty, she goes to extremes to prove her love.Krystal Riordan goes from rags to riches when she is adopted by a loving family. But her fairytale becomes a nightmare when she begins dating a pimp in NYC.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Leslie Gordon/Erica Sheppard
programme.desc: Leslie Gordon hopes that a vacation with her man will bring them closer together. But when he lets her in on a devilish plan, her getaway turns into a nightmare. Later, Erica Sheppard runs away from an abusive relationship with her ex. When a friend asks for a favor, her fresh start quickly fades to black.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Owens/Eason
programme.desc: Teen mom Ashley Owens struggles to make ends meet in Charlotte, North Carolina until she falls for a bad boy with a plan for some easy cash. In Illinois, Nicole Eason dreams of giving her husband a loving family. When her own babies are taken away, she�ll use deception and deceit to fill their home with kids.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Baited by Love
programme.desc: In a whirlwind romance, a beautiful college student falls under the spell of a local bad boy. He enourages her to help him with his criminal activities, and out of love she agrees. But when the two find themselves in an intense moment of danger, she quickly throws her morals away to protect her man.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Young and Na�ve
programme.desc: When a teenage girl meets a handsome, charming older man, she feels like everything in her life is falling into place. But soon, a gruesome discovery related to the disappearance of a local woman will reveal a darker side to this love story. Before long, police are on the trail of a teen who would go to any lengths to be with her man.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Horror Beneath the Ashes
programme.desc: A community is rocked when a mom, her children, and their neighbor are brutally murdered. As detectives try to uncover who would commit such a heinous quadruple homicide, their investigation leads to an undeniable clue pointing to the killer.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Struck by Jealousy
programme.desc: A loving nurse and mother is found bludgeoned to death in her home with evidence suggesting the killer is someone she knew. So when police learn of her involvement with multiple men, an act of jealousy seems likely � but which boyfriend is to blame?

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Wali Muhammad
programme.desc: Quinn and Vince are called to investigate the death of man found in a trap house in a suburban neighborhood. While uncovering nicknames and chasing down leads, Vince will find himself in a dangerous standoff to bring in the killer.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Kenyon Beaty
programme.desc: A casual summer morning turns deadly as a man is killed in a drive-by shooting. To solve this case, Quinn and Vince must build trust with the community and key witnesses to discover the leads they need to find the killer's true motive and identity.

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - Revenge Gone Wrong
programme.desc: When a man is shot and killed soon after an alleged domestic assault, authorities suspect the girlfriend, but through their investigation they learn she did indeed seek payback, but it was not intended to be deadly.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - A Wicked Rival
programme.desc: When 34-year-old Julii Johnson is gunned down in front of her boyfriend’s home, police are baffled by the lack of a motive – until they find half a million dollars hidden in her boyfriend’s condo. Was the murder payback by a rival drug dealer? Or did this “It Girl” finally make the wrong woman jealous?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - The Lone Wolf
programme.desc: It seemed nothing could tear these three best friends apart. But behind closed doors trouble was brewing, and things would boil over in the most horrifying way. Now it’s up to detectives to determine what triggered the bloodshed? And who’s to blame?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - At The Water's Edge
programme.desc: When a mother of three disappears in the middle of the night, her boyfriend and children have little to offer police. Will a mysterious friend be able to lead them to her? Or will the search for her end on the banks of a raging river?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - In Too Deep
programme.desc: When the bodies of a missing couple surface in the waters of New Orleans, detectives wonder who could have committed this heinous crime. Their investigation leads them to a young woman who was so desperate, she�d do anything for her man.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Circle of Trust
programme.desc: A close-knit community is gripped with fear after two families are found brutally murdered. Police work to unravel the mystery and are led down a terrifying trail of violent lies, proving you can�t trust anyone, even the ones you love the most.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Love on the Run
programme.desc: When a young model meets a charming, handsome man on the heels of losing her father, her future suddenly seems brighter. But soon, she finds herself following him down a dark road, destroying anyone who gets in their way � all in the name of love.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Lost in Loyalty
programme.desc: A heartbroken young mother is elated to get a second chance at love when she meets the man of her dreams � until she discovers her new lover has a dark side. Before long, she finds her life launched into chaos when she sets out to prove she�s the ride-or-die woman that her man demands.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Loving in Fear
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when a beautiful college student drops everything to run away with her new man. When she suddenly returns home nine months later, she reveals the shocking story of a brutal murder, notorious drug kingpin, and the destructive desire at the center of her secret life.
